RetrieveWithID.summary: Retrieves a record with the supplied key values.
RetrieveWithID.param: The primary and site foreign key.

RetrieveWithUnique.summary: Retrieves a record with the supplied unique values.
RetrieveWithUnique.param: The parent foreign and site foreign key.

IDKey.param: The primary and site foreign key.

ParentKey.summary: Gets the Parent ID key columns.
ParentKey.param: The parent foreign and site foreign key.

UniqueKey.summary: Gets the Unique ID key columns.
UniqueKey.param: The parent foreign and site foreign key.
